tasks.name: Engine Oil & Filter Change
tasks.description: Replace engine oil and oil filter. Check for metal particles in old oil.

tasks.name: Primary Fuel Filter/Water Separator
tasks.description: Replace primary fuel filter element. Drain water from separator bowl.

tasks.name: Secondary Fuel Filter
tasks.description: Replace engine-mounted secondary fuel filter.

tasks.name: Raw Water Impeller
tasks.description: Replace raw water pump impeller. Inspect pump housing for scoring. Carry spare onboard.

tasks.name: Coolant Flush & Replace
tasks.description: Drain and flush cooling system. Refill with manufacturer-specified coolant mix.

tasks.name: Thermostat Replacement
tasks.description: Replace thermostat and gasket. Test opening temperature.

tasks.name: Drive Belt Inspection
tasks.description: Check belt tension and condition. Look for cracks, glazing, fraying. Replace if worn.

tasks.name: Valve Clearance Adjustment
tasks.description: Check and adjust valve clearances per manufacturer specs.

tasks.name: Engine Zinc Anodes
tasks.description: Inspect pencil zincs in heat exchanger and exhaust elbow. Replace at 50% erosion.

tasks.name: Exhaust Elbow Inspection
tasks.description: Remove and inspect exhaust elbow for carbon buildup and corrosion. Critical failure point.

tasks.name: Cooling Hose Inspection
tasks.description: Squeeze all cooling hoses. Replace any that feel soft, spongy, or show surface cracking.

tasks.name: Transmission Fluid Check
tasks.description: Check transmission fluid level and condition. Top up or replace as needed.

tasks.name: Engine Alignment Check
tasks.description: Check engine-to-shaft alignment with feeler gauges. Misalignment causes vibration and bearing wear.

tasks.name: Propeller Inspection
tasks.description: Remove propeller, inspect blades for dings/bends, check shaft for fishing line damage, re-grease.

tasks.name: Propeller Shaft Zinc
tasks.description: Inspect and replace shaft zinc anode at 50% erosion.

tasks.name: Stuffing Box / Shaft Seal
tasks.description: Check shaft seal drip rate (1-2 drops/min under power for traditional). Adjust packing if needed.

tasks.name: Bottom Cleaning
tasks.description: Scrub bottom paint to remove marine growth. Tropical waters: monthly.

tasks.name: Bottom Paint Application
tasks.description: Haul out, pressure wash, sand, and apply 2 coats antifouling paint.

tasks.name: Hull Zinc Anodes
tasks.description: Inspect and replace hull zincs at haul-out. Match anode metal to water type (zinc for salt, magnesium for fresh).

tasks.name: Through-Hull & Seacock Inspection
tasks.description: Exercise all seacocks. Check for dezincification (pink/reddish bronze). Inspect hose connections and double clamps below waterline.

tasks.name: Keel Bolt Inspection
tasks.description: Inspect keel bolt condition at haul-out. Check for weeping, rust stains, or movement.

tasks.name: Rudder Bearing & Stock
tasks.description: Check rudder for play. Inspect bearing, stock, and quadrant connections.

tasks.name: Gelcoat Inspection
tasks.description: Inspect for cracks, chips, blisters. Repair stress cracks. Check for osmotic blistering below waterline.

tasks.name: Cutlass Bearing Check
tasks.description: Check shaft play in cutlass bearing. Replace if shaft can move more than 1mm.

tasks.name: Battery Load Test
tasks.description: Load test all batteries. Check specific gravity (flooded) or voltage (AGM/LiFePO4). Clean terminals.

tasks.name: Battery Water Level (Flooded)
tasks.description: Check and top up electrolyte with distilled water. Only for flooded lead-acid batteries.

tasks.name: Electrical Connection Audit
tasks.description: Inspect all visible wiring for chafe, corrosion, heat damage. Tighten terminal connections. Apply dielectric grease.

tasks.name: Alternator Belt & Output
tasks.description: Check belt tension. Verify charging output with multimeter (13.8-14.4V at battery terminals while running).

tasks.name: Shore Power Cord & Inlet
tasks.description: Inspect shore power cord for damage, burned pins, corrosion. Check inlet connection quality.

tasks.name: Navigation Light Test
tasks.description: Test all navigation lights: port, starboard, stern, masthead, anchor, steaming. Carry spare bulbs.

tasks.name: Bonding System Check
tasks.description: Test continuity of bonding system between all underwater metals. Check for stray current corrosion.

tasks.name: Standing Rigging Inspection
tasks.description: Inspect all shrouds and stays for broken strands, meat hooks, corrosion. Check swage fittings and turnbuckles. Replace rigging every 10-15 years.

tasks.name: Running Rigging Inspection
tasks.description: Inspect halyards, sheets, and control lines for chafe, UV damage, stiffness. Replace as needed.

tasks.name: Chainplate Inspection
tasks.description: Check chainplates for cracks and corrosion. Inspect bedding/sealant around deck penetrations for leaks.

tasks.name: Mast Step & Partners
tasks.description: Inspect mast step for corrosion and cracks. Check mast partners for compression damage.

tasks.name: Spreader & Fitting Check
tasks.description: Inspect spreader tips, tangs, and attachment points. Check for cracks and proper angle.

tasks.name: Furler Service
tasks.description: Clean and lubricate roller furling drum. Inspect UV strip on headsail. Check furling line for wear.

tasks.name: Winch Service
tasks.description: Strip, clean, and re-grease all winches. Inspect pawls and springs. Replace worn bearings.

tasks.name: Sail Inspection
tasks.description: Inspect all sails for chafe, UV damage, stitching failure. Check battens, slides, and hanks.

tasks.name: PFD/Lifejacket Inspection
tasks.description: Check all PFDs for rips, deteriorating straps, faded reflective tape. Test inflatable mechanisms. Check CO2 cartridge charge dates.

tasks.name: Fire Extinguisher Check
tasks.description: Verify gauge in green zone. Check mounting bracket secure. Shake dry chemical units monthly to prevent caking. Note expiry dates.

tasks.name: Visual Distress Signals
tasks.description: Check expiration dates on all flares and smoke signals. Replace 30 days before expiry. Carry current set plus recently expired backup.

tasks.name: EPIRB/PLB Test
tasks.description: Self-test EPIRB/PLB per manufacturer instructions. Verify registration is current. Check hydrostatic release date (if applicable).

tasks.name: Liferaft Service
tasks.description: Professional liferaft service per manufacturer interval (typically 3 years). Check hydrostatic release and cradle mounting.

tasks.name: Sound Signal Devices
tasks.description: Test horn, whistle, and bell. Check compressed air canisters for charge level. Carry manual backup.

tasks.name: CO Detector Test
tasks.description: Test carbon monoxide detector. Replace batteries. Check expiry date (typically 5-7 year lifespan).

tasks.name: Bilge Pump Test
tasks.description: Test automatic float switch activation. Verify strong discharge stream. Test manual backup pump. Clean strainer.

tasks.name: First Aid Kit Audit
tasks.description: Check all medications for expiry. Replace used items. Ensure seasickness medication current. Verify waterproof container seal.

tasks.name: Jacklines & Tethers
tasks.description: Inspect jacklines for UV damage, chafe, corrosion at attachment points. Check harness tethers and clips. Replace per manufacturer schedule.

tasks.name: Marine Head Service
tasks.description: Rebuild marine toilet pump with new valves and seals. Clean joker valve. Inspect discharge hose for permeation (smell test).

tasks.name: Holding Tank Pump-Out
tasks.description: Pump out holding tank at designated facility. Flush with fresh water. Check vent for blockage.

tasks.name: Water Heater Anode
tasks.description: Check and replace water heater anode rod. Flush tank to remove sediment.

tasks.name: Freshwater Filter
tasks.description: Replace freshwater filter element. Sanitize water system with dilute bleach solution at start of season.

tasks.name: Fuel Tank Inspection
tasks.description: Check fuel tank for water contamination (fuel paste or visual). Inspect fittings and vents. Polish fuel if stored over winter.

tasks.name: Below-Waterline Hose Clamps
tasks.description: Inspect all hose clamps below waterline. Ensure double-clamped. Replace any showing rust or weakness. Use marine-grade stainless only.

tasks.name: VHF Radio Test
tasks.description: Test VHF radio on working channel with nearby station. Verify DSC functionality. Check MMSI programmed correctly.

tasks.name: GPS/Chartplotter Check
tasks.description: Verify GPS fix accuracy against known position. Update electronic charts to latest edition.

tasks.name: Radar Performance Check
tasks.description: Verify radar acquiring targets correctly. Check for interference patterns. Clean scanner unit.

tasks.name: AIS Verification
tasks.description: Verify AIS transmitting correctly (check with nearby vessel or web tracker). Confirm MMSI and vessel data accurate.

tasks.name: Compass Deviation Check
tasks.description: Compare magnetic compass to GPS bearing on known transit. Record deviation card. Swing compass if deviation exceeds 5°.

tasks.name: Depth Sounder Verification
tasks.description: Compare depth reading against chart datum in known location. Clean transducer face of marine growth.

tasks.name: Instrument Calibration
tasks.description: Calibrate wind instruments, log/speed, and heading sensor. Cross-reference with known values.

tasks.name: Spring Commissioning
tasks.description: Complete pre-season checklist: launch, step mast, connect systems, engine start, sea trial. Typically April-May in Maritimes.

tasks.name: Fall Decommissioning
tasks.description: Complete winterization: haul out, engine winterize, drain water systems, remove sails, cover. Typically October-November in Maritimes.

tasks.name: Insurance & Registration Renewal
tasks.description: Renew vessel insurance and registration. Update surveyed value if needed. Verify coverage limits.

tasks.name: Transport Canada Safety Audit
tasks.description: Verify vessel meets Transport Canada Small Vessel Regulations: required safety equipment, capacity plate, licensing.
